title: Secure named partner: need confirmation, disciplines, grade bands, languages, field-testing commitment
context: oer-science-labs currently has verifiedNeed: false across all tasks because no named partner has confirmed need in writing. The project's full Definition of Shipped (partner-validated) requires a named school, district, teacher association, or OER/education nonprofit to confirm need, name priority disciplines/grade-bands/languages, and ideally commit to classroom field-testing. This task is the outreach and securing process. Success unlocks verifiedNeed=true and a concrete requestor across all tasks.
objective: Identify, engage, and secure a commitment from at least one named partner organization (school, district, teacher association, recognized OER/education nonprofit, or science educators' body) that confirms the need for free, safe, low-cost, standards-aligned science guides in writing (letter of support or MOU), names priority disciplines, grade bands, languages, and material-availability constraints, and ideally commits to classroom field-testing of at least 5 guides. Document the partner engagement process and outcome.
acceptanceCriteria: At least one named partner organization is identified and confirms the need for the library in writing (letter of support or MOU on file)
The partner names priority disciplines, grade bands, languages, and material-availability constraints in the written confirmation
The partner ideally commits to classroom field-testing of at least 5 guides (required for steward-020)

The partner engagement document records: organization name, contact role, date of confirmation, form of confirmation (letter/MOU), priority disciplines/grade-bands/languages named, field-testing commitment (yes/no/conditional), and any constraints stated
On success, verifiedNeed is flipped to true and requestor is set to the named organization across all oer-science-labs task files

No personal data of students, parents, or non-public contacts is recorded or committed to the repository; any personal data received (e.g. contact email) is handled per the partner's data-sharing agreement and not committed
output: A document recording the secured partner commitment (letter of support or MOU reference, named disciplines/grade-bands/languages, field-testing commitment) and a PR updating verifiedNeed and requestor across task files.
